Claude Sonnet 4 Model Card

Provider: Anthropic
Model Name: Claude Sonnet 4
Release Date: 2025-05-22

Overview:
Claude Sonnet 4 is a large language model developed by Anthropic. It features 175 billion parameters and supports a context window of 200,000 tokens. The model excels at coding, analysis, and creative writing tasks.

Benchmarks:
- MMLU: 92.3%
- HumanEval: 89.1%
- GSM8K: 96.4%
- HellaSwag: 95.2%

Capabilities:
- Advanced code generation and debugging
- Long-document analysis and summarization
- Creative writing and ideation
- Multi-step reasoning
- Instruction following

Limitations:
- May hallucinate facts in knowledge-intensive domains
- Limited real-time knowledge (training cutoff applies)
- Cannot execute code or access the internet

Training:
- Training data cutoff: April 2025
- Trained on a diverse corpus of publicly available text
